How do I start using Reunai?: How do I start using Reunai?
It's very simple: sign up on our platfor: It's very simple: sign up on our platform, upload your first meeting recording (audio or video) and in less than 5 minutes you will receive a detailed summary with all tasks extracted and organized by priority. You can also schedule integrations to automate the entire process.
Can I change plans at any time?: Can I change plans at any time?
Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade: Absolutely. You can upgrade or downgrade your subscription at any time from your account settings. Changes will be applied immediately and charges will be prorated. There are no long-term commitments or penalties for changing plans.
